text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 1 day(s) — nothing terrible yet.
label: influenza/mild

text: Just wanted to check in — I've felt slightly off for a few days.
label: non-infectious

text: Just a touch of flu I think — mild fever, a bit of tiredness, dry throat. 1 day(s), and it's been the same for a while now.
label: influenza/mild

text: Gasping with each breath, sharp chest pain, high fever, thick productive cough. 8 day(s) now.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I started with a cold but the cough has lingered — a bit of chest tightness too. 4 day(s). I'm struggling to breathe.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: It hit me fast — fever, chills, splitting headache, muscle pain everywhere. Been in bed 8 day(s). I have a very high fever.
label: influenza/mild

text: I feel like I'm suffocating. Severe shortness of breath, chest agony, high fever. 6 day(s) like this, and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/moderate
